description: Reformat the biology exam document at /home/ga/Documents/bio101_final_raw.docx into a professional examination paper. The final document should have the Title Block (first 4 lines) centered, with 'Westfield Regional High School' in Bold 16pt and 'Biology 101 — Final Examination' in Bold 14pt. The 'INSTRUCTIONS:' paragraph must be italicized. Apply 'Heading 2' style to the section headers 'Part A', 'Part B', and 'Part C'. All other body text should be 'Liberation Serif' (or Times New Roman), 12pt, with 1.5 line spacing. Page margins must be 1.00 inch on all sides. Include a footer on every page with 'Biology 101 — Final Examination' and page numbers. The final line '--- END OF EXAMINATION ---' should be centered and bold. Save the formatted document to /home/ga/Documents/bio101_final_exam.docx.
